# social-communication

Sleeves focused on interpersonal communication, support, sales, or relational interaction.

## Sleeves in this category
- [sample-basic-minimal](./sample-basic-minimal/README.md)

## What each sleeve folder contains
- `sleeve.json`
- `README.md`
- `STRUCTURE.md`
- `NEOSTACKS.md`
- `NEOBLOCKS.md`
- `MOLT-BLOCKS.md`
